nasb.text: Then Hezekiah said to Isaiah, “The word of the Lord which you have spoken is good.” For he thought, “For there will be peace and truth in my days.”

esv.text: Then Hezekiah said to Isaiah, “The word of the Lord that you have spoken is good.” For he thought, “There will be peace and security in my days.”

cnv.text: 希西家對以賽亞說：“你所說耶和華的話不錯呀！”因為他心裡想：“在我有生之日，必有平安和穩固。”

ccb.text: 希西迦对以赛亚说：“耶和华借你说的话很好。”因为他想：“我有生之年将平安稳妥。”

csbs.text: 希西加对以赛亚说：“你所说的耶和华的话甚好。”因为他想：“至少在我的年日里，必有平安和安稳。”
